narrative:
New Richmond Village B (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,343 registered voters, with 62.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.0 percentage points.
